content: Cierre MLB Phase 57: endpoint /api/mlb/player-props + 26 tests verdes
Crear services/football_news_context_ingestion.py (Google News RSS scraping fail-soft + keyword detection)
Crear services/football_context_trend_discovery.py (5 submódulos: squad disruption, form streaks, corners trend, protected goals, missed match rescue)
Añadir endpoint GET /api/football/context-trend en server.py + flag opcional en orchestrator
Crear UI: FootballContextTrendCard.jsx + integración en MatchDetailPage
Corregir errores pre-existentes en mlb_day_orchestrator.py (F821, E701, E702)
